mapper.select: SELECT board_id, title, hit_cnt, creator_id, DATE_FORMAT(created_datetime, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_datetime FROM t_board WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY board_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_board(title, contents, created_datetime, creator_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{contents}, NOW(), #{creatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_board SET hit_cnt = hit_cnt + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
UPDATE t_board SET title = #{title}, contents = #{contents}, updated_datetime = NOW(), updater_id = #{updaterId} WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
